chunks.text: P a g e | 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Reference No.S-01 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of reference received from Special Judge ACE, (P) Hyderabad. 11.04.2022 Mr. Shahid Ahmed Shaikh, Deputy Prosecutor General, Sindh. == Learned Judge to dispose of the subject cases in accordance with law after providing chance of hearing to all the concerned in best of his wisdom and knowledge. The reference is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE Muhammad Danish*
